citation.article_title: Sourmash v4: A multitool to quickly search, compare, and analyze genomic and metagenomic data sets
citation.author: Irber
citation.unstructured_citation: Irber, L., Pierce-Ward, N. T., Abuelanin, M., Alexander, H., Anant, A., Barve, K., Baumler, C., Botvinnik, O., Brooks, P., Dsouza, D., & others. (2024). Sourmash v4: A multitool to quickly search, compare, and analyze genomic and metagenomic data sets. Journal of Open Source Software, 9(98), 6830. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.06830

citation.article_title: YACHT: An ANI-based statistical test to detect microbial presence/absence in a metagenomic sample
citation.author: Koslicki
citation.unstructured_citation: Koslicki, D., White, S., Ma, C., & Novikov, A. (2024). YACHT: An ANI-based statistical test to detect microbial presence/absence in a metagenomic sample. Bioinformatics, 40(2), btae047. https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btae047

Metatranscriptomics as a tool to identify fungal species and subspecies in mixed communities–a proof of concept under laboratory conditions. IMA Fungus, 10, 1–10. https://doi.org/10.1186/s43008-019-0012-8
